creator: thepish@FreeBSD.org
text:
>	df stay in disk wait about week or more

Just checking the obvious - you don't have any network mounts such as NFS or
anything by any chance? Can you send a dmesg.boot so we can look at the
drivers you have as well as a df (when it does work :) ) to see your mounts?

Peter
